{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Game managers wear the same snail shirts every day, and ask their family and friends to spend money on the game, so the game managers can get paid!
|affct=FAME
|hard=DEF
|source=[[Altar#One_time_wishes|Dragon Wish "I want to meet the GM"]]
|color=blue
|earth=3
|water=4
|fire=5
|wind=2
|form=Dragon
|element=Water
|realm=Yamato
|orangehard=HP
}}
